using System;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using ZeroAlloc.Flux;

namespace ZeroAlloc.Flux.Generated;

internal sealed class Store_Sample_CounterState : IStore<global::Sample.CounterState>
{
    private readonly object _lock = new();
    private global::Sample.CounterState _state;

    public Store_Sample_CounterState()
    {
        _state = new global::Sample.CounterState();
    }

    public global::Sample.CounterState Value => _state;

    public event Action<global::Sample.CounterState>? StateChanged;

    internal ValueTask UpdateAsync(global::Sample.CounterState newState)
    {
        lock (_lock)
        {
            _state = newState;
        }
        StateChanged?.Invoke(newState);
        return ValueTask.CompletedTask;
    }
}
